source: PseudoForge reviewed ntoskrnl 10.0.26200.8457 executive work item, DPC, APC, and timer role-only identity pack; no private field offsets.

profiles.source: Reviewed ExQueueWorkItem public worker queue enqueue wrapper and priority queue wake path.

parameters.source: ExQueueWorkItem WorkItem argument queued through the executive worker queue
ExQueueWorkItem QueueType controls target executive work queue
ExQueueWorkItem preserved queue type local used while selecting the queue
ExQueueWorkItem PRCB local used in queue wake and scheduling path

profiles.source: Reviewed ExQueueWorkItemEx validation, type-to-priority, and ExpQueueWorkItem dispatch path.

parameters.source: ExQueueWorkItemEx work item pointer validated before queueing
ExQueueWorkItemEx work item type converted to executive priority
ExQueueWorkItemEx third argument forwarded to ExpQueueWorkItem
ExQueueWorkItemEx ExpTypeToPriority result

profiles.source: Reviewed ExTryQueueWorkItem thin wrapper into ExpTryQueueWorkItem.

parameters.source: ExTryQueueWorkItem work item pointer forwarded to ExpTryQueueWorkItem
ExTryQueueWorkItem queue type forwarded to ExpTryQueueWorkItem

profiles.source: Reviewed ExpQueueWorkItem priority queue insertion, ETW enqueue tracing, and waiter wake path.

parameters.source: ExpQueueWorkItem queue object pointer used for executive priority queue insertion
ExpQueueWorkItem work item entry inserted in the target queue
ExpQueueWorkItem priority-like argument used while selecting the queue slot
ExpQueueWorkItem starting node index argument
ExpQueueWorkItem thread slot offset argument
ExpQueueWorkItem target dispatcher header local in queue wake path
ExpQueueWorkItem wait list head local used by KiWakePriQueueWaiter

parameters.source: ExpTryQueueWorkItem target queue object argument
ExpTryQueueWorkItem work item entry argument
ExpTryQueueWorkItem priority-like argument
ExpTryQueueWorkItem IRQL local around queue lock acquisition

profiles.source: Reviewed ExpValidateWorkItem verifier/bugcheck guard for queued work item inputs.

parameters.source: ExpValidateWorkItem first argument is the work item being checked
ExpValidateWorkItem second argument participates in work item validation

profiles.source: Reviewed ExpWorkerThread worker loop, priority queue removal, ETW work item trace, and indirect worker callback dispatch.

parameters.source: ExpWorkerThread start parameter used as the worker queue context
ExpWorkerThread current thread local
ExpWorkerThread local typed as struct _IO_WORKITEM in corpus output
ExpWorkerThread local carried into bugcheck and callback dispatch paths

profiles.source: Reviewed ExpCheckForWorker partition scanning and priority queue lock acquisition before deciding worker availability.

parameters.source: ExpCheckForWorker scans worker availability by partition
ExpCheckForWorker second argument participates in queue context selection

profiles.source: Reviewed ExpCreateWorkerThread system thread creation, object reference, priority boost, and handle close path.

parameters.source: ExpCreateWorkerThread node or queue context argument for system worker thread creation
ExpCreateWorkerThread second argument influences worker thread creation
ExpCreateWorkerThread thread handle local closed after object reference
ExpCreateWorkerThread referenced system worker thread object

profiles.source: Reviewed KeInitializeDpc initialization of KDPC deferred routine and context fields.

parameters.source: KeInitializeDpc Dpc argument initialized in place
KeInitializeDpc deferred routine callback argument
KeInitializeDpc deferred context argument

parameters.source: KeInsertQueueDpc KDPC argument inserted into a DPC queue
KeInsertQueueDpc first system argument delivered to the DPC routine
KeInsertQueueDpc second system argument delivered to the DPC routine

profiles.source: Reviewed KeRemoveQueueDpc public wrapper into KeRemoveQueueDpcEx.

parameters.source: KeRemoveQueueDpc KDPC argument removed from pending DPC queue

KeInitializeApc kernel routine callback argument

KeInitializeApc normal context argument
